command: localperf bench http-load --backend openai-chat --base-url https://ugmgglehlpy403um.us-east-2.aws.endpoints.huggingface.cloud --model /repository --dataset-name random --num-prompts 8 --max-concurrency 1 --request-rate inf --result-filename runs/qwen36-35b-nvfp4-hf-endpoint-256k-extension/ctx256k-run/results/hf-qwen36-256k__prefill-256k__c1.json --timeout 14400s --min-mem-available-gib 1 --random-input-len 260095 --random-output-len 1 --endpoint /v1/chat/completions --extra-body '{"chat_template_kwargs":{"enable_thinking":false}}' --ignore-eos --temperature 0
